name: Risk difference per data-driven inner category
label: Risk difference + 95% CI (per group)
description: One risk difference (%) + 95% CI per data-driven inner category (e.g. PT or SOC) of Group2, comparing the two arms present in the subset. The two arms are self-derived from the data. References df_poptot (population_based). Verified against fda-ae-t13/t36 Mth_03_1a using an independent stats::prop.test(correct = FALSE) recomputation (180/187 PTs, 22 SOCs).

parameters.name: groupvar2here
parameters.label: grp var 2
parameters.description: Grouping variable from Group2 (data-driven inner category)
